tool_purpose: A Visual Question Answering model trained on the GuanacoVQADataset, designed to work on consumer hardware like Colab Free T4 GPU. The model can be used to answer questions about images. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Visual Question Answering. API call: pipeline('visual-question-answering', model='JosephusCheung/GuanacoVQAOnConsumerHardware').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
